creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Compiling updating/reinstalling port print/foomatic-db-engine on FreeBSD 10.0-CURRENT/amd64 ends up in the below shown error while the same port compiles well on FreeBSD 9.0-STABLE/amd64 (all systems compiled with CLANG, alls systems most recent sources/buildworld as of today and up to date ports tree and the very same /etc/make.conf etc/src.conf). 

gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/print/foomatic-db-engine/work/foomatic-db-engine-4.0.7/lib'
cp Foomatic/DB.pm blib/lib/Foomatic/DB.pm
cp Foomatic/UIElem.pm blib/lib/Foomatic/UIElem.pm
cp Foomatic/Defaults.pm blib/lib/Foomatic/Defaults.pm
cp Foomatic/PPD.pm blib/lib/Foomatic/PPD.pm
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/print/foomatic-db-engine/work/foomatic-db-engine-4.0.7/lib'
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/print/foomatic-db-engine/work/foomatic-db-engine-4.0.7/lib'
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/print/foomatic-db-engine/work/foomatic-db-engine-4.0.7/lib'
./mkinstalldirs //usr/local/bin
./mkinstalldirs //usr/local/sbin
./mkinstalldirs //usr/local/etc/foomatic
./mkinstalldirs //usr/local/share/foomatic//templates
/usr/bin/install -c -o root -g wheel -m 755 foomatic-printjob foomatic-configure foomatic-combo-xml foomatic-perl-data foomatic-ppdfile foomatic-compiledb foomatic-ppd-options foomatic-searchprinter foomatic-ppd-to-xml //usr/local/bin
/usr/bin/install -c -o root -g wheel -m 755 foomatic-kitload foomatic-getpjloptions foomatic-addpjloptions foomatic-preferred-driver foomatic-fix-xml foomatic-nonumericalids foomatic-replaceoldprinterids foomatic-printermap-to-gutenprint-xml foomatic-cleanupdrivers foomatic-extract-text //usr/local/sbin
( cd foomatic-templates && \
  /usr/bin/install -c -o root -g wheel -m 644 pjl_enum_choice.xml pjl_enum_option.xml pjl_num_option.xml //usr/local/share/foomatic//templates \
)
/usr/local/bin/perl -p -i -e "s:foomatic-templates:/usr/local/share/foomatic//templates:g" //usr/local/sbin/foomatic-addpjloptions
ln -sf foomatic-ppdfile //usr/local/bin/foomatic-datafile
if [ -d /usr/local/libexec/cups ]; then \
  ./mkinstalldirs //usr/local/libexec/cups/driver; \
  ln -sf /usr/local/bin/foomatic-ppdfile //usr/local/libexec/cups/driver/foomatic; \
fi
./mkinstalldirs //usr/local/man
./mkinstalldirs //usr/local/man/man1
./mkinstalldirs //usr/local/man/man8
/usr/bin/install -c -o root -g wheel -m 644 *.1 //usr/local/man/man1
install: *.1: No such file or directory
gmake: *** [install-man] Error 71
*** [do-install] Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/print/foomatic-db-engine.

===>>> Installation of foomatic-db-engine-4.0.7,2 (print/foomatic-db-engine) failed
===>>> Aborting update

Terminated

How-To-Repeat: Compile on FreeBSD 10.0-CURRENT/amd64 with CLANG
